name: Huntress
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Maim" (customRuntime, mechanics PROVEN LIVE 2026-06-09) — at +3, enemies struck by this weapon lose their REACTION abilities for 3 of their turns, then the saved bits restore. Cripple probe proved both halves: hold-zero combat +0x94 suppressed a Br-74 Counter through 5 hits (0.26^5 ~ 0.1% luck) AND a one-shot restore brought it back (it countered again). Runtime = acted-latch victims (Ricochet detector) + save/hold/restore + per-victim turn counter (CharmLock pattern). p3Desc draft: 'Foes it strikes lose their reactions for 3 turns.' RECOMMENDED BASE EDIT stands: proc 214 Arm Shot -> 213 Leg Shot (T5 pins, T6 Perseus deletes). PROSE STALE: identity claims WP9, ships WP8 + may-cast
